svg.text: LiteSpeed loads THIS handler — root cause of memory issue
LiteSpeed should use THIS handler for correct memory handling
Several plugins contain ini_set('memory_limit', '128M') as a fallback — this overrides server settings
UpdraftPlus, WP Statistics, Modern Events Calendar,
Amazon S3 Offload — all contain 128M ini_set calls
wp-content/mu-plugins/ | Cannot be disabled | Loads before all plugins
// Hooks at priority 99999 — always runs LAST
Generated during debugging of PHP memory_limit stuck at 128M — club4.no — March 2026
